Package org.eventb.core.ast

Interface IFormulaFilter2

All Superinterfaces:
IFormulaFilter
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultFilter
public interface IFormulaFilter2 extends IFormulaFilter
This interface extends IFormulaFilter to add support for predicate variables.
Since:
1.2
See Also:
  • Formula.getPositions(IFormulaFilter)

    boolean
    select(PredicateVariable predVar)
    Tells whether the given predicate variable passes this filter criterion.

    • select

      boolean select(PredicateVariable predVar)
      Tells whether the given predicate variable passes this filter criterion.
      Parameters:
      predVar - predicate variable to test
      Returns:
      true iff the given predicate variable passes the criterion
